utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 labeled sections. Therefore, only transportation fails full specification due to missing flight details.
